description_long: This is a modern duplex house featuring two symmetrical units connected by a central walkway on the upper floor. Each unit has large, rectangular windows arranged in neat rows, providing ample natural light to the interiors. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color with flat roofs and multiple outdoor terraces, including a paved patio and a grassy yard area. The front of the house faces a wide sidewalk and street, with each unit having its own main entrance and outdoor seating areas. The design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and functional outdoor living, with railings enclosing the patios and balconies. The overall structure is boxy and geometric, reflecting contemporary urban residential architecture.
description: A modern, boxy duplex house with flat roofs, large windows, and multiple terraces, featuring symmetrical units and clean, geometric lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing two main entrances, paved patio, grassy yard, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the grassy yard, extended sidewalk, and rear terraces with outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patios, upper walkway connecting the units, and additional outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the paved patio, side terrace, and large windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Double main doors with paved patios, no steps, and minimalistic overhangs; each entry is flanked by large windows and outdoor seating areas.
